name: Sour Cream Coffee Cake w/ Chocolate #t Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter and flour a 10-to-12-cup fluted tube pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat butter until creamy (about 1 minute).
4. Add sugar and continue beating until light and creamy (about 2 minutes).
5. Sift together flour, salt, baking soda, and baking powder.
6. Beat in half of the sifted mixture, then one egg.
7. Beat in another half of the sifted mixture, then the remaining egg.
8. Repeat with the last half of the sifted mixture, adding sour cream and vanilla.
9. Fold in walnuts and chocolate.
10. Transfer batter to prepared pan and smooth surface.
11. Bake for 45-55 minutes until cake begins to shrink from pan sides and toothpick inserted into center comes out clean.
12. Let cool in pan for 10 minutes, then turn onto wire rack. Cool completely before serving. Serves 12.
